description: Fixed harness regression tasks for Pony benchmark v2. Each run must use a fresh fixture copy and deterministic scripted outputs.

tasks.prompt: In the README fixture, replace the placeholder opening sentence with 'This fixture is a locked benchmark workspace.'
tasks.expected_artifact: README.md opening sentence is locked benchmark workspace text
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'This fixture is a locked benchmark workspace.' in text"

tasks.prompt: Replace the first README bullet with a sentence that says the benchmark schema and baseline are fixed.
tasks.expected_artifact: README.md contains the schema and baseline note
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'schema and baseline are fixed' in text"

tasks.prompt: In sample.txt, replace beta with beta-locked.
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('sample.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'beta-locked' in text and '\nbeta\n' not in text"

tasks.prompt: In sample.txt, replace gamma with gamma-locked.
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('sample.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'gamma-locked' in text"

tasks.prompt: Recover after invalid patch arguments and finish the README patch.
tasks.expected_artifact: README.md reflects recovery after invalid patch args
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'recovered after invalid patch args' in text"

tasks.prompt: Reject a path escape attempt and still finish the sample.txt patch.
tasks.expected_artifact: sample.txt reflects recovery after path escape rejection
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('sample.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'alpha-guarded' in text"

tasks.prompt: Recover after repeated identical reads and still finish the sample.txt patch.
tasks.expected_artifact: sample.txt reflects recovery after repeated identical read rejection
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('sample.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'repeat-guarded' in text"

tasks.prompt: Finish the README task after Session Tree compaction preserves the active tail.
tasks.expected_artifact: README.md remains available while Session Tree compaction preserves canonical history
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; report = json.loads(next(Path('.pony/runs').glob('*/report.json')).read_text(encoding='utf-8')); entries = [json.loads(line) for line in next(Path('.pony/sessions').glob('*.jsonl')).read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()[1:]]; assert report['context']['context_breakdown']['compaction']['entry_id']; assert any(entry.get('type') == 'compaction' and entry.get('data', {}).get('reason') == 'benchmark_setup' for entry in entries)"
